title: Aegorin Fabric
description: This is the Fabric Version of the Aegorin Modpack
body:
![Aegorin Modpack Fabric Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4dc7d35209ec529308ffa099a698d76f6a6eac8.png) # Aegorin Fabric Modpack Dieses Modpack ist eine kleine Sammlung an Fabric Mods fĂĽr den Server Aegorin. This Modpack is a small Collection of Fabric Mods for the Server Aegorin. ## Funktionen / Functionalities - [Aegorin Addon Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aegorin-addon-pack) TP von [@Valaron-Jakob](https://modrinth.com/user/Valaron-Jakob) ist eingestellt - [Item Addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/item_addon) TP von [@Valaron-Jakob](https://modrinth.com/user/Valaron-Jakob) ist eingestellt - [RP-Log](https://modrinth.com/mod/rplog) von [@Fireflasher](https://modrinth.com/user/Fireflasher) ist eingestellt mit RP-Channel von Aegorin - [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura) ist eingestellt mit [@Valaron-Jakob](https://modrinth.com/user/Valaron-Jakob)'s eigenem ShowTyping Script - [Spell Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-checker) ist eingestellt mit einem WĂ¶rterbuch der meist genutzten WĂ¶rter Aegorin's
[EN]

- [Aegorin Addon Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aegorin-addon-pack) TP by [@Valaron-Jakob](https://modrinth.com/user/Valaron-Jakob) is added - [Item Addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/item_addon) TP by [@Valaron-Jakob](https://modrinth.com/user/Valaron-Jakob) is added - [RP-Log](https://modrinth.com/mod/rplog) by [@Fireflasher](https://modrinth.com/user/Fireflasher) is configured with RP-Channel off Aegorin - [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura) is configured with [@Valaron-Jakob](https://modrinth.com/user/Valaron-Jakob)'s exclusive ShowTyping script - [Spell Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-checker) ist configured with a dictionary the most used words of Aegorin

## Modlist: ### Performance: - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) - [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - [lazy-language-loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazy-language-loader) - [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - [CullLeaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - [BetterBeds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds) - [ParticleCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core) - [No-Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry/) - [Server Resourcepack Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-resource-pack-checker) ### Utility: - [Modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - [Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) - [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) - [RP-Log](https://modrinth.com/mod/rplog) - [EnhancedBookWriting](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedbookwriting) - [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - [Dont Clear Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcch) - [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura) - [Spell Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-checker) - [Tooltip Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll) - [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) - [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - [Logical Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/logical-zoom) - [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) - [Book and Quick Safe](https://modrinth.com/mod/book-and-quick-save) - [Shulker Preview](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulker-preview) - [Sound Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) - [Improved Sign Editing](https://modrinth.com/mod/improved-sign-editing) - [ChatShot](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatshot) - [Client Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-tweaks) - [FastDoll](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastdoll) - [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) - [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes) - [No Ressourcepack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) ### Libraries - [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) - [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
Discontinued Mods

- [Cull Less Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves) - [DashLoader](https://modrinth.com/mod/dashloader) - [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - [Keep Command History](https://modrinth.com/mod/keepcommandhistory)

### Changelogs
1.21.1.0

- updated versioning to . - updated to 1.21.1 - updated loader 0.16.5 - added texturepacks: - [StayTrue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) - `Excalibur` - `Patrix` - `Fancy Crops` - added shaderpacks: - [Sildur's Vibrant Lite](https://sildurs-shaders.github.io/screenshots) - [Chocapic13](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/chocapic13-shaders) - `BSL Classic` - added mods: - `CullLeaves`, replaces `CullLessLeaves` - `Don'tClearChatHistory`, replaces `KeepCommandHistory` - `ModernFix` - `FerriteCore` - `BetterBeds` -`ParticleCore` - `No-Telemetry` - `No Resourcepack Warnings` - decided by vote: - `Book and Quick Safe` - `Shulker Preview` - `Sound Physics Remastered` - `Improved Sign Editing` - `ChatShot` - `Client Tweaks` - `FastDoll` - `Remove Reloading Screen` - `Not Enough Crashes` - added libraries: - `YetAnotherConfigLib` - `Fzzy Config` - `Fabric Language Kotlin` - `Collective` - `Balm` - removed mods: - no 1.21 support: - `CullLessLeaves` - `KeepCommandHistory` - `Dashloader` - `LazyDFU` - `Starlight` - updated configs: - `EnhancedBlockEntities`, smart chest disabled - `RPLog`, added Windows and Linux formatting - `Figura`, added RPBase - Avatar by Valaron from Aegorin - updated Spellchecker dictionary

## Rechte / Rights(Credits) Das Modpack wird ausschlieĂźlich als zusĂ¤tzliches Angebot fĂĽr den Server [Aegorin](https://aegorin.de) zur VerfĂĽgung gestellt. AuĂźerhalb dieses Bereiches wird keine UnterstĂĽtzung angeboten. Alle Rechte liegen bei den entsprechenden Moderstellern. Das Modpack wird von [@Valaron-Jakob](https://modrinth.com/user/Valaron-Jakob) und [@Fireflasher](https://modrinth.com/user/Fireflasher) verwaltet.
[EN]

This modpack is provided exclusively as an additional offer for the server [Aegorin](https://aegorin.de). No support is provided outside this area. All rights reserved by the respective Mod-Creators. This modpack is managed by [@Valaron-Jakob](https://modrinth.com/user/Valaron-Jakob) and [@Fireflasher](https://modrinth.com/user/Fireflasher).
